HGSS.383.0000:
There’s an odd tree!
Use the SquirtBottle? [0200,0000]
HGSS.383.0002:
The odd tree doesn’t like the
SquirtBottle!\f
The odd tree attacked!\f
HGSS.383.0003:
Yo!\f
Haven’t you had trouble with a boulder
blocking your way? Of course you have!\f
For people like you, there’s an HM
that will come to your rescue!\f
HGSS.383.0004:
Are you the one who took care of the
odd tree in the way?\f
You’re quite the Trainer!
Take this!\f
HGSS.383.0005:
It contains make-’em-faint Rock Smash.\f
You can even use it to smash boulders
once you’ve earned the Violet City\r
Gym Badge!\f
But beware!
Hidden moves like this are hard for\r
your Pokémon to forget once they’ve\r
learned them.\f
You should think carefully which
Pokémon should learn it.
HGSS.383.0007:
An odd tree is blocking the way
to Ecruteak City.\f
It’s preventing me from shopping.\r
Something should be done about it.
HGSS.383.0008:
The odd tree is gone, as if it just
walked away...!\r
What? It was a Pokémon?\f
Well, finally I can go to Ecruteak
to do some shopping.\f
If you follow the path from where the
odd tree was, you’ll reach\r
Ecruteak City!
HGSS.383.0011:
Trainer Tips\f
The same kind of Pokémon may look the
same, but they can grow differently.\f
Their strengths may look the same
in the beginning, but those strengths\r
can change as they grow.
HGSS.383.0012:
Trainer Tips\f
The move Dig can take you back to
the entrance when you use it.\f
If you want to explore a cave or
something similar, a Pokémon with\r
Dig will be quite useful.
HGSS.383.0013:
I’m the Flower Shop’s Floria!\f
Listen, listen! When I sprinkled water
on that wiggly tree, it jumped right up!\f
It just has to be a Pokémon.\f
I bet it would be shocked out of
disguising itself if you soaked it!
HGSS.383.0014:
I’m the Flower Shop’s Floria!\f
Listen, listen! When I sprinkled water
on that wiggly tree, it jumped right up!\r
It just has to be a Pokémon.\r
If you soaked it...\f
Oh, that’s the SquirtBottle!\f
Soak the tree for me!
I want to see what happens!
HGSS.383.0015:
That was fun!\f
I want to give you this
for entertaining me!\f
HGSS.383.0016:
With the Berry Pots, you can grow
any Berry from any region\r
with no worries!\f
HGSS.383.0017:
That’s right!
I’ll give you some Berries, too.\f
Berry Pots won’t do any good
without Berries.\f
HGSS.383.0018:
You have to plant Berries in the soil.
You should water them from time\r
to time. Then they’ll grow strong!\f
I have to go back to Goldenrod.\r
Are you heading for Ecruteak?\f
Then you should go north here.
See you around!\f
